name: Sprunki Bullet Blender
description: Sprunki Bullet Blender is a casual game where players control bullets and projectiles to hit targets across various levels. Customize your shooter and ammunition to adapt to different challenges. Web Dev <a href='https://www.crazygamesx.com/'>https://www.crazygamesx.com/</a> .Strategically plan shots and trajectories using unlocked resources, ensuring each hit counts. Navigate diverse elements and characters to master each level with precision and creativity.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
